---
title: "installization"
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# installization

>Do not use the preview function in this installization file.

## qiskit

```{julia}
using Pkg
Pkg.activate(".")
Pkg.add("LanguageServer") # which provides the language server for julia, and it is the dependency of the vscode extension of julia.
using CondaPkg
CondaPkg.add(["seaborn", "pylatexenc", "matplotlib", "numpy", "qiskit", "qiskit-aer"]) # NOTE: the installization command and import command are different(qiskit_aer).
```

## quantum cloud platform

### quark

* install the dependencies

```{julia}
using CondaPkg
CondaPkg.add_pip("quarkstudio") # NOTE: quarkstudio does not included in conda, use PYPI.
```

* Test the environment

```{python}
from quark import Task
token = "dYXyLLSQQtMWT7wOoIHo2EmPCmlStsZ`VSfO5NSjzCT/Rg3dUPzZEP45TPzFEOxZUP4dUN7JDd5WnJtJTP1pEPzpEOyBDOz1DOx1jOzBkNjpkJ1GXbjxDN7JDcm[Y[tKDMj13ck6DcqGXctGHemCIR5l{O5BkOzZ{O5FUZjpkJzW3d2Kzf"
tmgr = Task(token)
print(tmgr.status()) # express the ranks now.
```

### IBM

We may not use this platform laterly, but I still record the config way.

* install the dependencies

```{julia}
using CondaPkg
CondaPkg.add(["qiskit-ibm-runtime", "qiskit-algorithms"])
```

* Test the environment

```{python}
from qiskit_ibm_runtime import QiskitRuntimeService
IBM_API_TOKEN = 'N7Xu2261xeB3CilWxUt3Khsm6h0ezbYdbfZvVau5N4qD'
QiskitRuntimeService.save_account(IBM_API_TOKEN, overwrite=True) # renew the token. 
```

```{python}
# check the account.
from qiskit_ibm_runtime import QiskitRuntimeService
service = QiskitRuntimeService() # 创建服务实例（自动加载已保存的账户）
print("Active account:", service.active_account()) # 检查活动账户
print("\nAvailable backends:") # 验证后端列表（确认账户有效）
for backend in service.backends():
    print(f"- {backend.name} | Status: {backend.status().operational}")
```
